message:
test(ftui-widgets): bd-2xj.7 standalone widget crate isolation tests

19 integration tests proving every major widget renders and handles
events using ONLY ftui-widgets (no ftui-runtime dependency). Validates
the adoption-wedge property: users can embed individual widgets without
pulling in the Elm runtime.

Covers: Block, Paragraph, List, Tabs, Tree, ProgressBar, Sparkline,
StatusLine, Scrollbar, MeasurableWidget, zero-area safety, composition,
keyboard/mouse event handling, and linker isolation canary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
